about.headline: Building infrastructure that powers hyperscale data centers
paragraphs: I'm Priyank Vyas, a Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience at Cisco and Microsoft (Azure team).
I've interviewed with 25+ top product companies (Google, Nvidia, Amazon, Qualcomm, Intel, Oracle, etc.) and cleared multiple rounds before joining Microsoft.

I help engineers prepare for system-level interviews (C, OS, Networking), FAANG/Big Tech transitions, and career growth strategies. My sessions are practical, focused on real interview patterns, and designed to help you stand out.
Let's work together to make your next big move happen.

testimonials.text: I had both my LLD and HLD rounds with Priyank, and it was a great experience. He explained the concepts very clearly, shared helpful resources, and guided me through the Microsoft interview process in detail.
testimonials.name: Charan Udayagiri

testimonials.text: Had a very good discussion with Priyank. He cleared all my doubts and shared his experience which will definitely going to help me in taking career decisions.
testimonials.name: Sameer Salunkhe

testimonials.text: Priyank is a great mentor who has guided me a lot. I can confidently say that if you need guidance or help, he is someone you can truly look up to.
testimonials.name: Achintya Chavan

testimonials.text: Priyank was very helpful in understanding my situation and conveying his thoughts accordingly. He advised me according to the current market situation and gave industry insights.
testimonials.name: Aditya

testimonials.text: Had a wonderful and insightful conversation with Priyank Bhai through Topmate. He is extremely approachable, knowledgeable, and provides practical advice that truly helps in career planning and interview preparation.
testimonials.name: Harsh Mehta

testimonials.text: The advice helped me improve clarity, structure, and alignment with industry standards.
testimonials.name: Bhupendra Vyas

testimonials.text: Priyank provided me with confidence, clearly addressed my doubts, and even extended a few extra minutes to resolve my queries. Thank you for the support.
testimonials.name: Anjali Thakur

testimonials.text: Priyank is very helpful & knowledgeable. Got a lot of clarity & interview insights after having a discussion with him.
testimonials.name: Mohit Sharma

hero.tagline: Software Engineer at Microsoft Azure building bare-metal storage infrastructure on DPUs & SmartNICs. 5+ years deep in systems programming, networking, and high-performance data planes.
